title: alsophila alta
intro: Alsophila alta, also known as the Tree Fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the fronds of Alsophila alta are often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
